---
title: "Research"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-single">
  <div class="content">

    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Research</div>

      <div class="section-subhead section-subhead--published">Peer-Reviewed Publications</div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Mapping the ROAD to Democracy: A Global Dataset of Overturning Attempts and Organizations in Civil Resistance Transitions</div>
        <div class="pub-meta">Elmore, Naela, Kashmiri Medhi, <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong>, and Jonathan Pinckney (2026). <em>Journal of Peace Research</em>. <span class="pub-status">Online Early</span></div>
        <div class="pub-links">
          <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1093/jopres/xjag002" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Digital Provision Inclusion in Trade Agreements: the Death of (Digital) Distance through a Gravity Model Approach</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> (2025). <em>European Journal of International Relations</em>. <span class="pub-status">OnlineFirst</span></div>
        <div class="pub-links">
          <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1177/13540661251367340" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-subhead section-subhead--published">Working Papers</div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Why Take a Detour: The Strategic Choice Between Bilateral and Multilateral PTAs</div>
        <div class="pub-meta">Ye, Huei-Jyun and <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong>. Presented at ISA 2025, IHS Papers Workshop 2025, WPS UTD 2025, MPSA 2026.</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Rulemakers and Ruletakers in Digital Trade Governance: Network Structure and the Diffusion of Digital Provisions in Preferential Trade Agreements</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>. Presented at IHS Proposal Workshop 2025, ISA 2026.</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Entrepreneurship, Informal, and Formal Markets: A Humanomics Study of Guatemala</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> and Ricardo R. Noé. Presented at PCS 2026.</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Watch Your Back: Identifying Overturning Organizations in Civil Resistance Transitions</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>, Kashmiri Medhi, Naela Elmore, and Jonathan Pinckney. Presented at ISA 2026.</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Signaling Anti-Western Positioning: Regime Type, Alignment, and the Surge in Interest for the BRICS</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>, Kelvin Chun-Man Chan, Minh Dao, Sadman Shafiq, Charles Alexander Weimer, and Tiziano Cecconato. Presented at MPSA 2026.</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-subhead section-subhead--published">Work in Progress</div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Making Commitments Bite: Institutional Capacity and the Domestic Effects of International IP Rules</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>. Presented at GSIPE 2025, ISA 2025.</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Competing to Negotiate: How Rivalry Shapes the Fate of International Treaties</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> and Huei-Jyun Ye</div>
        <div class="pub-note">Abstract coming soon</div>
      </div>

    </section>

  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-text">&copy; 2026 Giuseppe Peressotti</p>
</footer>
```
